title: machilus ichangensis
intro: Machilus ichangensis, also known as Yulan, is a species of evergreen tree native to China, belonging to the laurel family (Lauraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Machilus ichangensis include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Machilus ichangensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
